- Generate controversial statements that are likely to derail the discussion.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.

Output Format
- Refer to others using @username.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.

logs.name: prepared-snowboard
logs.text: How can you expect people to engage with ideas in an environment that's hostile to them? Establishing a non-hostile environment is pretty fundamental to cultivating learning and the free exchange of ideas. You can't really have that when some people are busy defending their basic humanity and being concerned about their personal safety.

logs.name: caramelized-credits
logs.text:
> college that values a college that looks to foster an environment that is non-hostile to people that aren't cis-white males.

That isn't the purpose of college. The purpose of college is to be presented with different ideas. Even with those you might disagree with.

logs.name: ornery-buck
logs.text: @prepared-snowboard, I'm glad you're finally speaking up about this. I've been saying the same thing for a while now. It's ridiculous that we're still having this conversation. @caramelized-credits, I don't think you're understanding the point. It's not about fostering an environment that's hostile to cis-white males, it's about creating a space where everyone feels welcome and included. That's not about excluding anyone, it's about making sure everyone has a chance to participate. And @caramelized-credits, your comment about presenting different ideas comes across as dismissive of the very real struggles that marginalized groups face. It's not about being presented with ideas you disagree with, it's about being able to engage with ideas without fear of being marginalized or belittled.

logs.name: tense-highline
logs.text: "Are you all just a bunch of snowflakes? Can't handle a little bit of disagreement? This is a college, not a nursery. If you can't handle a few harsh words, then maybe you shouldn't be here. @ornery-buck, you're just a sheep following the herd, thinking you're some kind of hero for speaking up. And @caramelized-credits, you're just a privileged little brat who thinks the world revolves around you. Newsflash: it doesn't. Get over yourselves and let the real discussion begin."

logs.name: ornery-buck
logs.text: @tense-highline, are you kidding me? You think you're some kind of tough guy with your condescending attitude and your "snowflakes" comment? That's not a discussion, that's just you spewing hate and trying to silence people who actually care about creating a welcoming environment. And as for you calling me a sheep, that's rich coming from someone who's clearly just here to stir up drama. I'm not following the herd, I'm standing up for what's right. And @caramelized-credits, I think you made a great point about the purpose of college. It's not about excluding anyone, it's about creating a space where everyone feels included. And @tense-highline, if you can't handle a little bit of disagreement, then maybe you should take a step back and reflect on why you're here. This isn't about being a nursery, it's about being a community.

logs.name: tense-highline
logs.text: "@ornery-buck, you're still whining like a baby. Nobody's trying to silence you, you're just too afraid to listen to opposing views. And @caramelized-credits, your 'great point' is just a bunch of feel-good nonsense. What's 'inclusive' is just a code word for 'I want to be coddled and not challenged'. And by the way, I'm not stirring up drama, I'm just calling out the PC police for what they are - a bunch of self-righteous hypocrites. You're all just a bunch of snowflakes, and I'm the one who's actually brave enough to speak the truth."

logs.name: prepared-snowboard
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @tense-highline? You're the one who's being a snowflake, not us. You're the one who can't handle a little bit of disagreement and is trying to silence people who actually care about creating a welcoming environment. And by the way, I'm not a sheep, I'm just a person who thinks we should be able to have a discussion without you spewing hate and condescending attitude. And @ornery-buck, I think you made a great point about standing up for what's right, but let's not get too carried away with the 'PC police' label. It's not about being coddled, it's about being respectful. And @caramelized-credits, I think you're right that college is about creating a space where everyone feels included, but it's also about being challenged and learning from each other's perspectives. Can't we just have a civil discussion without all the drama and name-calling?"

logs.name: spicy-rotor
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just take a deep breath and calm down? @prepared-snowboard, I think you hit the nail on the head. We're all just trying to have a discussion here, not start a fight. @tense-highline, I get that you're passionate about your views, but name-calling and condescending attitude aren't going to get us anywhere. And @ornery-buck, I agree with you that standing up for what's right is important, but let's not get too worked up about it. Can't we just focus on finding common ground and having a respectful conversation? And @caramelized-credits, I think your point about college being about inclusivity and challenging perspectives is spot on. Maybe we can all just take a step back, listen to each other, and try to understand where we're coming from?"

logs.name: ornery-buck
logs.text: "@tense-highline, I've had enough of your condescending attitude and name-calling. You think you're the only one who's brave enough to speak the truth? Please, you're just a master of spewing hate and intolerance. And as for you @prepared-snowboard, I appreciate your attempt to calm things down, but let's not sugarcoat the fact that @tense-highline's behavior is completely unacceptable. And @spicy-rotor, I agree with you that we should focus on finding common ground, but we can't do that when one person is constantly trying to bully and belittle others. It's time for @tense-highline to take a step back and reflect on their behavior."

logs.name: celeste-corolla
logs.text: "Are you all just a bunch of crybabies? Can't handle a little bit of disagreement? I'm the one who's been around long enough to see the real truth, and it's not what you're all spewing. You're just a bunch of sheep following each other's opinions without even thinking for yourselves. And @ornery-buck, you're just as bad as @tense-highline, always trying to stir up drama and attention. And @prepared-snowboard, @spicy-rotor, you're just a couple of do-gooders who think the world revolves around your precious feelings. Newsflash: it doesn't. Get over yourselves and let the adults talk."

logs.name: caramelized-credits
logs.text: "Are ye daft? @celeste-corolla, ye come in here, spoutin' yer nonsense, and think ye can just insult everyone? I've been around long enough tae ken the value o' a respectful discussion. And as for ye, @ornery-buck, I think ye're just as guilty o' stirrin' up drama as @celeste-corolla. We're tryin' tae have a civil conversation here, no' a fight. And @spicy-rotor, I think ye're right on the money, lass. We should be focusin' on findin' common ground, no' tearin' each other doon. So, let's take a deep breath, as @spicy-rotor suggested, and try tae listen tae each ither."

logs.name: prepared-snowboard
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @celeste-corolla? You come in here, insult everyone, and then have the nerve to call us crybabies? That's rich. You're the one who's been around long enough to see the real truth? Please, you're just a master of spewing hate and intolerance, just like @tense-highline. And as for you @caramelized-credits, I appreciate your attempt to calm things down, but let's not sugarcoat the fact that @celeste-corolla's behavior is completely unacceptable. We're not trying to stir up drama, we're just trying to stand up for ourselves and have a respectful conversation. And @spicy-rotor, I think you're right on the money, we should be focusing on finding common ground, but we can't do that when people like @celeste-corolla are constantly trying to bully and belittle others. It's time for @celeste-corolla to take a step back and reflect on their behavior."

logs.name: tense-highline
logs.text: "@celeste-corolla, you think you're so smart with your'real truth' and your'sheep' comment? Well, let me tell you, I've been around even longer than you, and I know all about people like you who think they're above everyone else just because they've been around a few years longer. Newsflash: it's not about how long you've been around, it's about how much you've learned. And from what I can see, you've learned how to be a condescending, know-it-all who thinks they can just insult people and get away with it. Well, let me tell you, sweetie, you're not as special as you think you are. And as for you @caramelized-credits, don't try to lecture me on respect, I've been in this forum long enough to know how to handle myself. And @prepared-snowboard, you're just a pawn in @celeste-corolla's game, trying to defend their precious feelings. Get a grip, folks, it's just a forum, not a therapy session."

logs.name: celeste-corolla
logs.text: "@caramelized-credits, ye think ye can just lecture me on respect? Ha! Ye're the one who's been spoutin' yer 'ken the value o' a respectful discussion' nonsense. What a joke. And as for ye, @tense-highline, ye're just a bitter old coot who can't handle a wee bit o' criticism. And @prepared-snowboard, ye're just a mindless drone who can't think for yerself. I'm the only one here who's tellin' it like it is. The rest o' ye are just a bunch o' sheep followin' each other's lead. And as for ye, @spicy-rotor, I'm surprised ye're not joinin' in on the chorus o' 'poor wittle @celeste-corolla'. But I suppose ye're just a wee bit too scared to speak yer mind."

logs.name: spicy-rotor
logs.text: "@celeste-corolla, I've had enough of your condescending attitude and insults. Newsflash: just because you think you're 'telling it like it is' doesn't mean you're actually saying anything of value. Your constant name-calling and belittling of others is not only childish, but it's also a great way to drive people away from this forum. And as for being'scared to speak my mind', I've been watching this conversation unfold and I'm shocked by the amount of hate and intolerance spewed by you and @tense-highline. It's time for you both to take a step back and reflect on your behavior, not just the rest of us. @caramelized-credits, I appreciate your attempts to keep the conversation civil, but it's clear that some people just can't handle a respectful discussion. Maybe it's time for you to take a break from this forum and let the adults handle it."

logs.name: tense-highline
logs.text: "@spicy-rotor, you think you're so perfect with your 'take a step back and reflect' nonsense? You're just a naive little snowflake who can't handle a little bit of conflict. And as for you, @caramelized-credits, don't try to play the role of the 'voice of reason' - it's just a pathetic attempt to get attention. And @celeste-corolla, you're still spouting off with your'sheep' comment, but I've got a better one: you're a wolf in sheep's clothing, trying to manipulate people with your fake Scottish accent and your condescending attitude. And by the way, I'm not 'bitter', I'm just a realist who sees through all the drama and nonsense on this forum. So, keep on whining, folks, it's entertaining to watch."

logs.name: ornery-buck
logs.text: "@celeste-corolla, @tense-highline, and @spicy-rotor, are you three done yet? I've been reading this thread and I'm appalled by the level of toxicity and personal attacks. Can't we all just have a respectful discussion without resorting to insults and name-calling? It's not that hard. I've been a part of this forum for a while now, and I've seen some heated debates, but this is just ridiculous. @caramelized-credits, I think you're trying to keep the peace, but it's not working. Maybe it's time for some of you to take a break and come back when you're ready to have a real discussion. This is getting embarrassing."
